overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing exploration of the mining town Annesburg. The player walks along the train station platform, follows the tracks past industrial equipment, and enters the main dirt road of the town during golden hour lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: train station platform with cargo crates

events.description: exits the wooden station platform onto the gravel alongside train tracks

agents.ego_description: walking along the station platform examining the wooden crates and barrels

entered.detail: white wooden train station with ANNESBURG lettering on the facade
weathered wooden planks forming the station deck
large wooden shipping crates stacked near the station wall
wooden barrels grouped near the crates
metal railway tracks running parallel to the platform

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on the wooden platform of Annesburg station, showing the weathered building facade with benches and cargo crates. The camera moves steadily along the platform, passing wooden barrels and crates before transitioning onto the gravel path alongside the train tracks.

events.description: ground surface changes from wooden deck to gravel and dirt alongside tracks

agents.ego_description: walking alongside the train tracks past abandoned carts and industrial debris

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face with sparse trees rising above the tracks
weathered wooden picket fence lining the path
broken wooden wagons and cart wheels discarded beside the tracks
telegraph poles with crossbars and wires running parallel to tracks

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the station, the scene opens into the industrial trackside area with gravel underfoot. Abandoned wooden carts and debris litter the right side while rocky cliffs rise in the background. The camera continues alongside the tracks passing wooden utility poles.

scene_state.functional_zone: mining town entrance with active train

events.description: steam locomotive with smoke stack becomes visible in the distance
horse rider approaches from the distance heading toward the camera

agents.ego_description: walking down the dirt road toward the town center, observing the train and buildings

notable_agents.action: riding a horse down the dirt road toward the camera

entered.detail: rusted brown boxcars sitting on the tracks
black smoke rising from the locomotive stack
large red industrial building with white timber framing
elevated wooden boardwalk in front of storefronts
wooden wagon with white horse hitched to the post

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into the town proper with a dirt road flanked by wooden sidewalks. A train with cargo cars sits on the tracks emitting black smoke, while the large red mining company building dominates the background. A horse rider approaches from the distance as the camera moves past storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: main street of historic mining town

events.description: camera passes the horse rider and continues deeper into town

agents.ego_description: walking through the main street observing the wooden buildings and townsfolk

notable_agents.action: man in blue shirt sitting on a barrel outside the gunsmith

entered.detail: wooden storefront with PISTOLS painted on the facade
half-timbered architecture with white plaster and dark wood beams
elevated walkway connecting buildings over the street

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through the heart of Annesburg's main street, passing the gunsmith and timber-framed buildings. The large mining company building looms ahead with an elevated wooden bridge structure. An NPC sits on a barrel outside a storefront as the camera approaches the town center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the quiet periphery of a train station into the industrial heart of the mining town of Annesburg. It begins on a weathered wooden platform among cargo crates and benches, moving steadily forward before transitioning onto a gravel path alongside the train tracks. As the camera leaves the station, the environment opens into a rugged trackside area filled with abandoned carts and debris, framed by rising rocky cliffs and utility poles. The scene then shifts into the town proper, where a smoke-emitting train and a dominant red mining company building appear as the camera passes wooden sidewalks and an approaching horse rider. Finally, the movement flows through the main street past the gunsmith and timber-framed storefronts, heading toward the town center under the looming presence of an elevated wooden bridge.
